live_mutation_matrix.note: All four hero mutation chips run against the live provider (step-3.7-flash). Default row = index 2 (I10).

results.input: role=外部分析员, purpose=对外共享

requirements.title: 状态通行真实写入
requirements.evidence: Live matrix: wrong_code->纠错候选 (row_issue + correction_proposal), future_date->隔离 (row_issue + quarantine_item). agent_run + replay_timeline persisted each run.

requirements.title: 输入敏感的 Agent plan
requirements.evidence: .hunter/live-provider-smoke.json (smokeA focus=code_dictionary vs smokeB focus=none; different tools/state/hash). Live matrix gives 3 distinct states from 4 chips.

requirements.title: 人审/隔离安全边界
requirements.evidence: identity_conflict & access_denied -> 需审批 with pending release_approval; decideApproval writes a separate human replay event. docs/screenshots/06-approval.png.

requirements.title: Replay 证明
requirements.evidence: replay_timeline persisted with observe/plan/tools/mutate/verify; /api/run/[id] returns full trace. docs/screenshots/03-replay.png.

requirements.title: Source manifest
requirements.evidence: source_manifest + access_rule_snapshot rendered; audit export button. docs/screenshots/04-proof.png.

requirements.title: 失败诚实 (degraded)
requirements.evidence: .hunter/degraded-run.json -> status=degraded, state=检查失败, zero tools/issues. No fake success.

requirements.title: No-wallet exception
requirements.evidence: Product owns server-issued, role-controlled stateful workflow evidence; no chain/wallet code present. PRD section 'No-wallet exception'.

ui_fidelity.match: One-action hero (single editable row + consequence preview + 通行检查 CTA), progressive disclosure after state change (result/replay/proof/approval). Matches 'regulated-product-release-gate' direction and One-Screen Wall Guard.

discrepancies.reality: G2 example mockups exist as SVG at pitch/uiux/example-images/IMG-00X-*.svg; the .png paths are stale label references from the GPT-Pro source PRD.
discrepancies.action: noted; no public claim depends on the .png paths.

discrepancies.item: public/brand/og.png referenced by layout metadata + PRD
discrepancies.reality: og.png not generated (only logomark/wordmark/logo-mono SVG present).
discrepancies.impact: social-share preview image would 404; no runtime/page break.
discrepancies.action: fixed in G4: removed the dead images:['/brand/og.png'] reference in src/app/layout.tsx; OG now uses text title/description (type=website).
